name: aitp-research-protocol
description: Codex plugin for the local AITP v5 theoretical-physics research protocol.

interface.shortDescription: Use the local AITP v5 research kernel from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the repository-backed AITP v5 MCP server and installs skills for typed theoretical-physics research workflows, evidence recording, validation gates, and trust-controlled memory.
defaultPrompt: Continue my active AITP physics topic.
Check AITP status for a topic.
Record a validated physics result in AITP.
